interface.shortDescription: Company model gateway and role skills.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex App to the EzyHub company platform. /enroll signs you in with your company Google account and issues a managed gateway key (your ChatGPT login stays), switches models to the company gateway, and syncs the skills for your role. Skills stay up to date automatically.
defaultPrompt: Enroll this Codex App with EzyHub.
Check my EzyHub Codex key status.
